creator: freebsd@jonathanprice.org
text:
When I go to install net-mgmt/librenms on my system from pkg I get the following error:

pkg: Fail to create hardlink: /usr/local/share/doc/librenms/API/.API-Docs.md.bOFA6na2BGdt:Cross-device link

The output of freebsd-version is:
11.0-RELEASE-p10

I haven't yet had a chance to investigate the issue myself, but I thought it was best to open this first in case other users encounter the same problem.
